name: fam-os-vscode-connector
description: Permissioned semantic VS Code connector for the local FAM_OS Application Fabric.

famOS.connector.autoConnect.description: Connect the semantic connector after VS Code startup.

famOS.connector.socketPath.description: Absolute path to the private FAM_OS Application Fabric Unix socket. Empty uses the current-user runtime default.

famOS.connector.maximumObservationCharac.description: Maximum selected text returned by one authorized observation.

scripts.test: npm run compile && node --test out/test && PYTHONPATH=../../src:../.. python3 test/native_transport_integration.py && python3 test/validate_schemas.py
